body:
# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content
Moves the space information into the Domain struct. This is helpful because for mixed domains we can generate one domain from the other and make sure the spaces are consistent (i.e. the surface space obtained from the subsurface field matches the surface space of the surface field).

This also introduces the LSMMultiColumnDomain and the LSMSphericalShellDomain, and removes `coordinates` from the soil models, as the space is available and they can be computed on the fly.

## Benefits and Risks
The constructors for domains now contain a lot more stuff. Before this was wrapped in a separate function.

## Linked Issues
(Provide references to any link issues. Use closes #issuenum to automatically close an open issue)

- Closes #

title: Multi column lsm
